title: High CPU on API Gateway
symptoms: CPU > 90%, increased latency, thread pool exhaustion
root_cause: Memory leak in Python service due to unclosed connections
resolution: Restarted service and deployed patch to fix connection handling

title: Database Connection Timeout
symptoms: Timeout errors, slow queries, connection pool exhaustion
root_cause: Application not releasing DB connections properly
resolution: Increased pool size and fixed connection leak in application

title: Kubernetes Pod CrashLoopBackOff
resolution: Corrected environment variables and redeployed pods

title: Disk Space Alert on Production Server
symptoms: Disk usage > 95%, log files growing rapidly
resolution: Fixed log rotation policy and cleared old logs

title: High Latency in Payment Service
symptoms: API response time > 3s, increased error rates
resolution: Scaled dependent service and optimized queries

title: Kafka Consumer Lag Increasing
resolution: Scaled consumer group and optimized batch size

title: SSL Certificate Expiry Alert
resolution: Renewed SSL certificate and automated renewal process

title: Redis Cache Miss Spike
root_cause: Cache eviction due to memory pressure
resolution: Increased cache size and optimized TTL settings
